THE MILLSTONE WARRENS - page 1

1. GRINDING HALL. The great grindstone stands silent
under a shroud of pale dust. The main shaft can still be
turned by hand, raising a groan through the whole mill.

2. FLOUR CELLAR. Sacks of flour line the walls, and
something has gnawed clean through the lot. 1d4 goblins
squat among the sacks. A tripwire upends a rack of
millstones: save versus paralysis or take 1d6. Treasure
type C, plus a tithe of moon-flour, priceless to the
right buyer.
